description: Phase D of the 4-phase code-folder README pipeline. Audits the project root ./README.md against current reality (post-mk-spec-memory rename, mk-code-index/mk-skill-advisor extractions, local-embedding migration, tool-surface trim) and applies surgical edits to drifted sections. 3-pass pipeline: cli-devin context, cli-opencode cross-check, sonnet @markdown writer.
